description:
Holistic improvement pass on ir_codegen.rs across three axes:

REMOVE
- _kp dead function
- #![allow(dead_code)] blanket module suppress
- dead val computation in Term::Halt native branch
- dual HashSet<u32> var tracking (raw_f64_vars + raw_int_vars)
- var_repr() free function

CHANGE
- SpecRegistry::resolve fast path: eliminate .to_vec() allocation on every hit
- SpecRegistry::resolve slow path: subsumption single-pass fold
- reachability DFS: O(n_blocks²) block scan → pre-built lookup map
- coerce_to: add missing RawInt<->RawF64 arms (currently panics at compile time)
- VarRepr enum replacing the dual HashSet pair

DAG (each step is one commit):
  T1 remove _kp                 -+
  T2 remove blanket allow        |  T1 -> T2
  T3 remove dead val in Halt     |  independent
  T4 VarRepr enum + remove       |  independent
     dual HashSets + var_repr()  |
  C1 fix coerce_to missing arms  |  independent
  C2 fix resolve fast-path alloc -+
      +-> C3 subsumption fold       depends on C2
  C4 fix reachability DFS O(n2)     independent
title: fz-cg1 [EPIC] codegen: dead-code removal, efficiency, and correctness
